Selected Work

Projects I've helped shape

Four hands-on projects across brand activation, GTM, events, and community — the kind of work I would bring to a coordinator or associate role.

01

BMW Motorrad — Brand Activation & Marketing Execution

Marketing Intern, BMW Motorrad
Brand ActivationMarketing ExecutionDealer MaterialsCustomer JourneyStakeholder Coordination

Context

At BMW Motorrad, I support marketing execution across digital content, dealer-facing materials, and brand activation planning. My work sits across website content updates, event materials, stakeholder coordination, and dealer-facing execution, with a focus on helping translate premium brand standards into clear customer-facing experiences.

BMW Open Haus — National Dealer Guidebook

Developed a national dealer-facing guidebook for BMW Motorrad Open Haus, including guest flow, merchandising guidance, customer journey, promotional materials, and dealer checklist elements.

BMW Motorrad Days USA 2025

Supported BMW Motorrad Days USA 2025 through marketing materials, fleet planning support, merchandising, guest/VIP experience planning, and dedicated event area/stand coordination.

02

Fanex — Creator Partnerships & GTM Support

Business Development & Partnerships, Fanex
Creator OutreachCRM PipelinePartnership Follow-upGTM WorkflowsOnboarding

Context

At Fanex, I work on creator outreach, partnership development, CRM organization, and early GTM workflows. The project shows my ability to build outreach lists, contact potential partners, support onboarding, and help position an early-stage platform for creators and their communities. Fanex is a creator-focused marketplace where creator communities can engage with digital value linked to public personalities and creators.

What I supported

  • Built outreach lists and organized the CRM pipeline
  • Contacted potential creator partners and followed up
  • Supported onboarding and marketplace trust-building
  • Helped shape brand positioning for creators and their communities
  • Contributed to early GTM workflows — tracking, outreach, reporting

Results

  • 200+ creators contacted
  • 100+ replies
  • 20+ creator partnerships signed
  • 200+ weekly users

03

UIS Italian Symposium — Event Coordination, Partnerships & Community

Head of Symposium USA — Events, Partnerships & Marketing
Event CoordinationPartnershipsSponsorsSpeaker CoordinationSocial GrowthCommunity

Context

UIS brings Italian students, professionals, institutions, and cultural leaders together in New York at Columbia Business School. In 2025 I supported marketing and social growth; in 2026 I helped coordinate the event itself — partnerships, sponsors, and speakers.

2025 — Marketing & Social

I supported marketing and social media across Instagram and LinkedIn, building visibility through original content, reels, and stories ahead of the three-day program.

Sponsors & partners: Tarter Krinsky & Drogin · De' Longhi · Lattanzio KIBS · Eataly · Gomry · GEI New York.

2026 — Event & Partnership Coordination

I helped coordinate the New York edition — working across event logistics, partnerships, sponsor communication, speaker coordination, and panel content.

Partners & sponsors: Tarter Krinsky & Drogin · Sant Ambroeus · Gomry · NIAF · Campari.

04

Pista Mini Moto Giulianova — Grassroots Marketing & Social Growth

Marketing, Community & Social
Grassroots MarketingSocial GrowthCommunityBooking ConversionEvent Promotion

Context

Before I studied marketing, I learned it at my local minimoto track: creating content, growing the social channels, promoting events, and turning followers into real bookings. It's where I first saw how marketing connects to real customers and a real community.

What I did

  • Grew the track's Instagram and created content and reels
  • Promoted rentals, events, and track activities
  • Turned Instagram into a booking and inquiry channel
  • Supported the minimoto school and kids' activities
  • Helped organize community events

Results

  • Instagram grown 0 → 3,400+ followers over 7 years
  • 300K+ monthly reach · best reel 927K views
  • 400+ monthly rental bookings · 100+ weekly riders
  • 200+ children trained / season · 7 events organized
